account_disabled.safe_copy: Contact support and share the reference shown to restore access to your account.
account_disabled.support_guidance: Share the correlation ID with support.

action_not_allowed.safe_copy: This action is not available for your account.
action_not_allowed.support_guidance: Do not display internal authorization details.

auth_request_rate_limited.safe_copy: Wait a few minutes before trying this action again.
auth_request_rate_limited.support_guidance: Do not display internal authorization details.

authentication_required.support_guidance: Do not display internal authorization details.

authorization_temporarily_unavailable.safe_copy: This action is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
authorization_temporarily_unavailable.support_guidance: Share the correlation ID with support.

email_already_registered.safe_copy: This email already has an account. Sign in instead, or reset your password.
email_already_registered.support_guidance: Do not display internal authorization details.

email_verification_required.safe_copy: Verify your email, then sign in again.
email_verification_required.support_guidance: Do not display internal authorization details.

identity_conflict.safe_copy: Contact support and share the reference shown so we can restore your account.
identity_conflict.support_guidance: Share the correlation ID with support.

identity_provider_unavailable.safe_copy: Try again in a few minutes. If the problem continues, contact support and share the reference shown.
identity_provider_unavailable.support_guidance: Share the correlation ID with support.

invalid_credentials.safe_copy: Check your email and password, then try signing in again.
invalid_credentials.support_guidance: Do not display internal authorization details.

invalid_token.safe_copy: Your session is no longer valid. Please sign in again.
invalid_token.support_guidance: Do not display internal authorization details.

parent_binding_required.safe_copy: Complete the parent connection before continuing.
parent_binding_required.support_guidance: Do not display internal authorization details.

password_requirements_not_met.safe_copy: Choose a stronger password that meets the listed requirements, then try again.
password_requirements_not_met.support_guidance: Do not display internal authorization details.

password_reset_request_invalid.safe_copy: Request a new password reset code, then try again.
password_reset_request_invalid.support_guidance: Do not display internal authorization details.

resource_not_found.support_guidance: Do not display internal authorization details.

teacher_review_pending.safe_copy: Your teacher application is still under review.
teacher_review_pending.support_guidance: Do not display internal authorization details.

token_expired.safe_copy: Your session expired. We will try once to restore it.
token_expired.support_guidance: Do not display internal authorization details.

verification_code_expired.safe_copy: Request a new verification code, then try again.
verification_code_expired.support_guidance: Do not display internal authorization details.

verification_code_invalid.safe_copy: Check the verification code and try again.
verification_code_invalid.support_guidance: Do not display internal authorization details.

ownership.contract: Phase 472 generates and tests this shared behavior contract.
ownership.rendering: Phase 478 owns web and mobile rendering and application integration.
